productTitle: MikroTik CRS310-8G+2S+IN Switch – 2.5G Ethernet Switch with SFP+
name: MikroTik CRS310-8G+2S+IN
title: MikroTik CRS310-8G+2S+IN
title_extended: MikroTik CRS310-8G+2S+IN Switch – 2.5G Ethernet Switch with SFP+
short_description: Cloud Router Switch, 8x 2.5 GbE Ports, 2x 10G SFP+ Ports, Dual-Core ARM CPU, USB Port, 256GB RAM
description: Cloud Router Switch, 8x 2.5 GbE Ports, 2x 10G SFP+ Ports, Dual-Core ARM CPU, USB Port, 256GB RAM

detailed_description.heading: Speed and Performance
detailed_description.text: Elevate your network infrastructure with MikroTik CRS310-8G+2S+IN, a switch designed to deliver remarkable speed and performance. This cutting-edge device is designed to meet the needs of today's enterprises, data centres, and high-performance applications, providing a network solution that surpasses conventional switches.

This dynamic switch features eight 2.5 Gigabit Ethernet ports, which can effortlessly handle high-definition streaming, massive file transfers, and data backups concurrently. The game-changer lies in its two 10 Gigabit SFP+ ports. SFP+ (Small Form-factor Pluggable Plus) modules are designed to meet the demands of modern networking by supporting multiple data rates, including 1 Gbps, 2.5 Gbps, and a whopping 10 Gbps.

detailed_description.heading: Comprehensive Network Capabilities
detailed_description.text: Expand your networking capabilities with the CRS310-8G+2S+IN, powered by an efficient dual-core 98DX226S chipset clocked at 800 MHz. This powerful engine works with a robust 256 MB of RAM, creating an optimized environment that maximizes the advanced features of RouterOS v7.

The combination of high-performance Marvell 98DX226S switching chip, dual-core architecture and optimally sized RAM enables a seamless experience for any demanding applications or services you may run on your network. Together, they provide the strength to handle challenging tasks while ensuring you tap into the full spectrum of capabilities that RouterOS v7 offers, from advanced firewall configurations to real-time traffic analysis.

detailed_description.heading: Optimal Data Routing
detailed_description.text: The MikroTik CRS310-8G+2S+IN supports VLANs (Virtual Local Area Networks) for network segmentation and improved security, Jumbo frames for increased data transfer rates, and link aggregation for enhanced reliability and bandwidth.

Moreover, it comes with hardware-offloaded Layer-3 routing capabilities. Layer-3 routing is usually reserved for routers, but with this feature, the switch can make intelligent forwarding decisions based on the IP addresses, optimizing the route data packets take across your network. This results in better performance and reduced latency, making your network more efficient and responsive.

detailed_description.heading: Tough & Compact Design
detailed_description.text: Housed in a tough and compact casing, the CRS310-8G+2S+IN switch is built to excel in challenging, high-traffic settings. Its robust construction guarantees durability under constant use, with no compromise on performance or reliability.

There are multiple mounting options at your disposal, providing the flexibility you need to seamlessly integrate this unit into your existing infrastructure. If you have a standard 19-inch rack setup, the included rack mount ears make installation effortless. For those seeking even greater efficiency in space utilization, consider the optional RMK-2/10 mount kit. With this kit, you can position two CRS310 units side by side within a single 1U rack space.
